title: Department of Speech and Language Therapy Master Program
content:
Department of Speech and Language Therapy Master Program

Department of Speech and Language Therapy Master's Program About the Master's Program

Graduate School of

Health Sciences, Speech and

Language

Therapy Thesis Master's Program

The aim of the master's program with thesis in language and speech therapy is to help Language and Speech Therapy Undergraduate Program Graduate Students with Non-thesis master’s Degree students in Language and Speech Therapy to select the courses and their master's thesis to be written after the scientific researches so that they will become Expert Language and Speech Therapist. For this reason, the program will include theoretical and practical courses and scientific research focusing on specializations in the field of language and speech therapy professions.

Language and Speech Therapy the master’s Degree Program with Thesis has been planned and developed especially to the needs of our universities in the field of language and speech therapy to make significant contribution to meet the needs of our academicians and researchers. The thesis master program is also aimed at recruiting candidates for doctoral programs that will be opened or already opened.

Language and Speech Therapy Master's Degree Program with Thesis; will be conducted in such a way as to enable the development of specialized language and speech therapists in specific areas as well as the basic researches lacking in this field and the development of therapy programs for these areas.

Language and Speech Therapy Master's Degree Programs with Thesis will be conducted as separate programs with a modular structure under the roof of master’s thesis with Language and Speech Therapy. Those who successfully complete the master's programs with thesis in language and speech therapy will be entitled to a master's degree in the field of specialization.

Graduate programs with thesis to be opened in the Department of Language and speech therapy are at least four semesters. Students who are accepted to the program must successfully complete their courses in the fall and spring semesters of the year they are enrolled, write theses in the second and third semesters, and defend their theses at the end of the spring semester.

Thesis Master's programs in the Department of Language and speech therapy;

The Master's Degree Programs in the Department of Language and Speech Therapy are as follows. Programs to be accepted and quotas will be announced during the relevant registration period.

Language and Speech Therapy Master's Degree Program with Thesis (Voice Disorders and Therapy)

Language and Speech Therapy Master’s Degree Program with Thesis (Swallowing Disorders and Therapy)

Language and Speech Therapy Master's Program with Thesis (Acquired Language-Speech Disorders and Therapy)

Language and Speech Therapy Master's Program with Thesis (Dyslexia and Specific Learning Disorders and Therapy)

Language and Speech Therapy Master's Program with Thesis (Developmental Language-Speech Disorders and Therapy)

Language and Speech Therapy Master's Program with Thesis (Fluency Disorders and Therapy)

Language and Speech Therapy Master's Program with Thesis (Alternative and Supportive Communication Systems)
